name: feishu-md-sync-monorepo
description: Workspace root for the feishu-md-sync CLI and documentation site.

scripts.test:skill: npm run build && node scripts/test-agent-skill-validator.mjs && node scripts/validate-agent-skill.mjs --allow-development-version && node scripts/smoke-agent-skill-install.mjs
scripts.test:skill:release: npm run build && node scripts/test-agent-skill-validator.mjs && node scripts/validate-agent-skill.mjs && node scripts/smoke-agent-skill-install.mjs
